description: Kushal Manupati, Marketing Director at Binance, discusses enhancing user experience in the DEFI space, focusing on interoperability and collaboration with developers to create a scalable ecosystem. He emphasizes the importance of cross-chain solutions and fostering innovation to benefit users.
topic_summary: Kushal Manupati from Binance highlights the goal of improving user experience in DEFI through collaboration and interoperability among various blockchain ecosystems, including Solana and Ethereum. He addresses the challenges of fragmented liquidity and advocates for a unified approach to enhance user engagement [t=4:32 - t=253:39].
